base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_spinning_jump — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Samus curls into ball and rotates while mid-air. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame somersault spin — Samus curls into ball and rotates while mid-air; makes her invulnerable to some damage; iconic Metroid mechanic
